Package com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model

Class VendorProposal

java.lang.Object
com.example.CampusEventDiscovery.model.VendorProposal
public class VendorProposal extends Object
VendorProposal.java Model for vendor requests submitted by organizers and reviewed by admins.
